prompt: Generate a collection of 2D game assets for a desert environment in the cartoony, hand-drawn style of the reference image, including cacti, rocks, skulls, and dry bushes, presented on a transparent background.
prompt_refined: Generate a collection of distinct 2D game assets for a desert environment. Each asset should be rendered in the same cartoony, hand-drawn style as the examples found in image 1, characterized by thick black outlines, vibrant flat colors, and a whimsical, stylized appearance. The collection must include various cacti, rocks, skulls, and dry bushes, all presented individually on a transparent background.
